hero.desc: HicareNet drives advanced RPM and CCM operations through cutting-edge medical IT convergence, powering Hicare.net Inc's US market leadership with HL7 FHIR standard integration.

services.title: Our Operations & Technology
services.desc: Providing seamless RPM/CCM solutions backed by global R&D excellence and direct US market operations through Hicare.net Inc in California.

us.title: Direct US Market Operation
us.desc: Our California subsidiary directly manages Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM) and Chronic Care Management (CCM) services, ensuring localized expertise with global scale.

fhir.title: FHIR Standard
fhir.desc: Active adoption of HL7 FHIR protocols for seamless data integration with major US medical service providers and EHR systems.

rd.title: Service Core
rd.desc: Our dedicated R&D organization develops all proprietary services and provides direct technical support for the US subsidiary.

infra.title: Network Infrastructure
infra.desc: Powering hundreds of clinics across the United States and international markets with high-availability cloud medical systems.

company.label: R&D Driven Excellence
company.title: Technology Built for Direct Patient Impact.
company.desc: HicareNet is the engine behind Hicare.net Inc's success in the US. By centralizing our R&D, we ensure every terminal and platform meets stringent ISO and HIPAA standards while pushing the boundaries of what is possible in remote care.

hero.title: Empowering US RPM & CCM Services.
hero.desc: Based in California, Hicare.net Inc. is the United States subsidiary of HicareNet, dedicated to delivering advanced Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM) and Chronic Care Management (CCM) solutions.

focus.title: Our Focus
focus.desc: We specialize in bridging clinical gaps with our comprehensive RPM and CCM platform, optimized for US healthcare providers to improve patient outcomes and operational efficiency.

security.title: Security & Standards
security.desc: Unwavering commitment to data integrity. Our solutions are fully HIPAA compliant and certified under ISO 27001 (Information Security) and ISO 27701 (Privacy Information Management).

rd.title: Global R&D Organization: Full-Stack Innovation.
rd.desc1: Our R&D organization is the backbone of HicareNet, driving full-stack service development from embedded hardware systems to cloud-native healthcare software. We don't just build apps; we architect entire care ecosystems.
rd.desc2: Based strategically to provide 24/7 technical support for our US partners, our engineering teams ensure that the Hicare platform remains the most reliable and interoperable solution in the market, natively supporting HL7 FHIR protocols.

feature1.title: Full-Stack Dev
feature1.desc: End-to-end service architecture from device to cloud.

feature2.title: US Support
feature2.desc: Dedicated technical organization for North American operations.

timeline.title: Milestones
timeline.desc: Our strategic journey in bringing digital healthcare excellence to global markets.

y2024.title: ISO 27701 Certification
y2024.desc: Further solidified our commitment to privacy information management, achieving global ISO 27701 standards.

y2022.title: Hicare.net Inc. California
y2022.desc: Established our dedicated US headquarters in California to spearhead RPM and CCM operations.

y2018.title: FHIR & Interoperability
y2018.desc: Integrated native FHIR protocol support across all Hicare Hub solutions for seamless US EMR integration.

y2016.title: FDA 510(k) Clearance
y2016.desc: Successfully obtained US FDA certification for our remote monitoring hardware ecosystem.

expertise.label: EXPERTISE
expertise.title: Core Competencies
expertise.desc: Bridging clinical medicine, advanced engineering, and rigorous security standards.

card1.title: FHIR Protocol
card1.desc: Full HL7 FHIR support ensuring seamless interoperability with major US health systems and EMRs.

card2.title: HIPAA & ISO
card2.desc: Highest security tier: ISO 27001 and ISO 27701 certified, ensuring strict HIPAA data compliance.

card3.title: Full-Stack R&D
card3.desc: Internal expertise across embedded hardware, mobile development, and scalable cloud platforms.

card4.title: US Ops Support
card4.desc: 24/7 technical operations focused specifically on the unique needs of the US RPM/CCM market.

cta.title: A Trusted Partner in US Healthcare
cta.desc: From our global R&D headquarters, we provide the technology that powers clinical care for thousands of patients across the United States.

hero.title: Empowering US Value-Based Care.
hero.desc: HicareNet provides a comprehensive ecosystem for Remote Patient Monitoring (RPM) and Chronic Care Management (CCM), fully integrated with US healthcare standards.

hub.label: Central Gateway for RPM
hub.title: Hicare Hub: Streamlining Clinical Workflow
hub.desc: A medical-grade gateway specifically designed for US clinical environments. Hicare Hub automates the collection of vitals for RPM reimbursement billing, ensuring data accuracy and physician productivity.

f1.title: HL7 & FHIR Ready
f1.desc: Seamless integration with EPIC, Cerner, and Athenahealth via industry-standard HL7 and FHIR protocols.

f2.title: EHR/EMR Connectivity
f2.desc: Direct data flow into patient records to support CCM documentation requirements and medical necessity.

f3.title: FDA-Cleared Vitals
f3.desc: Aggregates data from FDA-cleared peripheral devices for clinically valid remote monitoring.

mobile.label: Patient Engagement for CCM
mobile.title: Hicare M: The Bridge to Better Outcomes.
mobile.desc: Designed for the US patient experience, Hicare M empowers individuals to participate in their care plans. It facilitates the 20 minutes of monthly clinical staff time required for CCM billing through secure messaging and tele-consultation.

f1.title: Automated Reporting
f1.desc: Generates patient logs required for US insurance reimbursement audits.

f2.title: Care Plan Access
f2.desc: Instant access to personalized clinician-developed CCM care plans.

f3.title: Secure FHIR Messaging
f3.desc: HIPAA-compliant communication that records interactions directly to the patient's chart.

f4.title: Educational Content
f4.desc: Provider-approved health resources to improve patient self-management.

rd.label: Innovation Excellence
rd.title: Powered by our Global R&D Center
rd.desc: The intelligence behind HicareNet is developed at our world-class R&D center. Our engineers and data scientists have built a robust, high-availability backend that handles millions of medical data points with sub-second latency.

backend.title: Proprietary Backend Architecture
backend.desc: Our backend orchestrates the entire ecosystem — from IoT device provisioning to FHIR data transformation. It's built on a microservices architecture that ensures 99.99% uptime, meeting the critical demands of US healthcare systems.

stat3.title: Clinical Data Intelligence
stat3.desc: Advanced algorithms for automated vitals trend detection and physician alerting.

compliance.label: Trust & Governance
compliance.title: US Healthcare Compliance & Security
compliance.desc: Security is not a feature; it is the foundation of our existence. HicareNet adheres to the world's most stringent security and privacy standards.

hipaa.desc: Full adherence to US Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act standards for PHI protection.

iso27001.desc: International standard for Information Security Management Systems (ISMS).

iso27701.desc: Privacy Information Management System (PIMS) certification for global data privacy compliance.

fda.title: Medical Device
fda.desc: Regulatory clearance for clinical use in RPM and diagnostic monitoring environments.

encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
encryption.desc: All data in transit and at rest is secured with AES-256 and TLS 1.3 encryption.

global.title: Expanding US Clinical Footprint
global.desc: Serving leading US healthcare systems with FHIR-enabled solutions for scalable population health management.

cta.title: Optimize your RPM/CCM Billing today.
cta.desc: Contact our solutions team for a demonstration of our EMR-integrated gateway.

hero.desc: HicareNet establishes a new benchmark for global R&D leadership, integrating localized US support to ensure 24/7 clinical excellence for our North American partners.
